description: Loket-native Discord channel adapter — a dumb pipe that forwards each message to a target agent over the loket bus and relays the reply. Discord has no long-poll (Gateway is a websocket, unavailable in wasip1), so this polls the REST messages API per configured channel. Idle (no polling) until a bot token is set, so it loads safely beside other channels.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: boot
exposes_rpc.description: Live daemon: poll the Discord REST messages API for each configured channel, forward each new (non-bot) message to the target agent over the bus, relay the reply. Idle (clean exit) without a token.

exposes_rpc.name: handle_update
exposes_rpc.description: Process ONE synthetic update (testable core): forward {text,channel_id,user,target} to the agent over the bus and return the reply. send:true relays to Discord when a token is set.
